headline: Williams Sonoma (WSM) Valuation Check After Goldman Sachs Upgrade And Solid Brand Performance
summary: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) is back on investors’ radar after Goldman Sachs shifted its view on the retailer, pointing to sturdy earnings, positive comparable brand revenue trends, and the breadth of its home-focused portfolio. See our latest analysis for Williams-Sonoma. At a share price of US$192.87, Williams-Sonoma has a 7 day share price return of 2.85% and a 30 day share price return of 5.76%. The 90 day share price return of 8.16% contrasts with a 1 year total shareholder return of 42.32% and...
